title: FDA SaMD Classification Record
description: Hash-chained append-only record of an AI/ML medical device's FDA SaMD classification lifecycle — pre-submission posture, submission pathway, clearance/approval state, Predetermined Change Control Plan (PCCP) status, post-market modification triggers, and 21 CFR §820 QMS evidence references. Bridges FDA's regulatory pathway taxonomy to the Kinetic Gain Protocol Suite audit-stream spine so a buyer, an auditor, or the manufacturer's regulatory team reads one verifiable record across the device's full lifecycle.

record_version.description: Record schema version. MUST be '0.1' for documents conforming to this draft.

issued_at.description: When this record version was published.

predetermined_change_control_plan.description: OPTIONAL. Required only if the device is under a PCCP per FDA's December 2024 final guidance.

lifecycle_state.description: Current state in the SaMD lifecycle state machine. State transitions are appended to transitions[] below.

transitions.description: Append-only state-machine history. Each entry MUST cite the prior state and the trigger; the chain MUST be consistent.

qms_evidence_refs.description: References to 21 CFR §820 / ISO 13485 QMS evidence — design history file, risk management file (ISO 14971), software lifecycle (IEC 62304), usability (IEC 62366), and clinical evaluation. URLs MAY point at an evidence-bundle-spec bundle.

evidence_bundle_url.description: Optional consolidated evidence-bundle-spec bundle covering all of the above

linked_records.description: Cross-references to other Suite documents this record relates to.

signature.description: OPTIONAL but RECOMMENDED. ed25519 signature over the canonical-JSON body excluding the signature field itself.

prev_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the prior record version in the chain (64 hex chars). First record uses 64 zeros.

hash.description: Canonical-JSON SHA-256 of the record body EXCLUDING the hash field itself (64 hex chars).

model_version.description: The specific software version covered by this record (semver or vendor-defined).

fda_establishment_registration_number.description: FDA Form 2891 establishment registration number, if registered.

samd_definition_imdrf.description: IMDRF SaMD Risk Category per the IMDRF SaMD Framework. I = low risk, IV = high risk.

udi_di.description: Unique Device Identifier — Device Identifier portion, if assigned (per 21 CFR §830).

product_code.description: FDA three-letter product code, e.g. QIH (radiological CAD).

fda_510k_predicate.description: K-number of the predicate device cited, if any (510(k) only).

PCCP.description: Per FDA's 'Marketing Submission Recommendations for a Predetermined Change Control Plan' (Final, December 2024). PCCP scopes are limited to specific, planned modifications.

scope.description: Narrative of what the PCCP covers (typically constrained to performance metric retraining or labeled-population expansion within named bounds).

boundary.description: The bound of acceptable change — e.g. 'sensitivity may not drop more than 2 pp from validation baseline in any protected subgroup'.

validation_protocol_url.description: URL to the Modification Protocol detailing how each modification will be validated before deployment.

impact_assessment_url.description: URL to the Impact Assessment showing why the modifications stay within the cleared device's safety + effectiveness profile.

to_state.description: New lifecycle_state value (matches lifecycle_state field once applied).

signer_key_uri.description: URI pointing at the JWK Set / public key. Convention: /.well-known/keys/samd-classification-signer.json#<kid>

signature_b64.description: Base64-encoded ed25519 signature over the canonical-JSON record body excluding the signature field.
